message:
🏗 Extract grid magic numbers to named constants in insight/llmd cards (#10106)

Replace inline grid pixel values with named constants (GRID_LEFT_PX,
GRID_RIGHT_PX, GRID_TOP_PX, GRID_BOTTOM_PX) in 7 card components.
Add CHART_HEIGHT_SM and CHART_HEIGHT_LG to centralized ui constants.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,11 @@ import {

+const GRID_RIGHT_PX = 20

+const GRID_BOTTOM_PX = 45
